description: The BreadcrumbInterface component is used by data feeds to get the translated name of one directory in a list of directories that makes a path. This is most commonly used in the Settings at the top to show a user where in the settings they are.

fields.NameConverter: The path segment converter Sync delegate (Takes a path name and its depth) and returns a localized string.
fields.ItemName: The field to drive with the localized string of the path segment (on an OS, this would be like the programmer name of a folder translated to your language)
fields.PathSegment: The path segment programmer name to convert to your language.
fields.ItemDepth: How many levels down in the path this string element would be.

usage: Used with a BreadcrumbManager to generate a list of path elements to show to the user in their language.
